description: Report date (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension for campaign performance analysis.
GA4 property ID (e.g. properties/297809897). Identifies the GA4 account.
Fivetran-generated unique hash ID for the row. Used for deduplication.
Traffic source that first acquired the user (e.g. google / facebook / (direct)). Attribution source dimension.
Name of the campaign that first acquired the user (e.g. WW_Japan_EverGreen_Q42025_FB). The primary campaign identifier.
Numeric ID of the campaign that first acquired the user. Use for joining with ad platform data.
Marketing medium that first acquired the user (e.g. cpc / organic / brand awareness). Attribution medium.
Number of ad clicks recorded by the advertiser platform for this campaign. Tracks paid ad interaction.
Fraction of sessions that were not engaged (0.0–1.0). Lower is better.
Total number of sessions attributed to this campaign.
Number of sessions lasting 10+ seconds or with conversion or 2+ page views.
Number of users who had an engaged session in this campaign.
Total number of users (new + returning) attributed to this campaign.
Average session duration in seconds for users from this campaign.
Total page or screen views from users attributed to this campaign.
Number of first-time users acquired through this campaign.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row from the source.
Total ad spend reported by the advertiser platform for this campaign (in the account currency).
